subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Most Great Vista in the world of existence, strive thou to build thy nest and shelter in the realm beyond all space [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بمنظر اکبر در جهان امکان بکوش که لانه و آشیانه در جهان لامکان سازی و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation
